Login.title: Sign In
Login.description: Enter your email to sign in to your account!
Login.errorDomainNotAllowed: Your email domain is not allowed.
Login.errorSendFailed: Failed to send magic link. Please try again.
Login.sentTo: We sent a sign-in link to {email}
Login.tryAgain: Try again with a different email

Pending.pendingMessage: Your account is currently pending approval by an administrator. You will receive an email once your account has been reviewed.
Pending.rejectedMessage: Your account request was not approved. If you believe this is an error, please contact your administrator.
Pending.deactivatedMessage: Your account has been deactivated. Please contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.

todos.title: My Todos
todos.noTodos: No todos yet. Create one to get started!
todos.errorStorageQuota: Storage quota exceeded. Please free up space.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your tasks
Dashboard.recentTodosEmpty: No todos yet. Create one to get started!
Dashboard.chartActivityEmpty: No activity data for the last 30 days.

ThemeGallery.title: Theme Gallery
ThemeGallery.description: Browse and select a theme for the application.

hero.badge: Organize your tasks before they pile up
hero.title: Organize Your Work,
hero.subtitle: A powerful todo management platform for modern teams. Create, track, and complete tasks with real-time collaboration, beautiful themes, and seamless workflows.

valueProps.title: Why TaskFlow
valueProps.subtitle: A productivity platform designed to help you and your team stay organized and focused

organize.title: Smart Organization
organize.description: Organize tasks with labels, priorities, due dates, and custom lists. Everything stays neatly structured and easy to find.

search.title: Instant Search
search.description: Search across all your tasks, notes, and projects in milliseconds. Filter by status, priority, date, and assignee.

reliable.title: Secure and Reliable
reliable.description: Your data is encrypted, backed up, and stored securely. Role-based access control keeps your information safe.

features.title: Complete Feature Set
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage tasks and boost productivity

crud.title: Full Task Management
crud.description: Create, edit, organize, and track tasks with ease. Support for subtasks, checklists, file attachments, and due dates.

realTime.title: Real-Time Updates
realTime.description: See changes instantly as your team works. Powered by Socket.IO for live collaboration and instant notifications.

themes.title: 42 Beautiful Themes
themes.description: Personalize your workspace with 42 handcrafted themes. Both light and dark modes available for every theme.

backgroundJobs.title: Background Processing
backgroundJobs.description: Schedule reminders, send email notifications, and process recurring tasks automatically with BullMQ queues.

responsive.title: Fully Responsive Design
responsive.description: Access your tasks from any device — desktop, tablet, or mobile. The interface adapts seamlessly to any screen size.

i18n.title: Multilingual Support
i18n.description: Available in English and Thai, with the ability to switch languages at any time without losing your context.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Easy Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Start managing your tasks effectively in minutes

step1.title: Create an Account
step1.description: Sign up with your email or Google Account in seconds. No credit card required.

step2.title: Create Your Tasks
step2.description: Add tasks with titles, descriptions, due dates, and priorities. Organize them into projects and lists.

step3.title: Stay Productive
step3.description: Track progress, collaborate with your team, and complete tasks. Get reminders and celebrate achievements.

targetAudience.title: Designed for Everyone
targetAudience.subtitle: No matter who you are, TaskFlow helps you stay organized and productive

professional.title: Professionals
professional.description: Manage work projects, deadlines, and priorities. Stay on top of your responsibilities.

students.title: Students
students.description: Track assignments, study schedules, and group projects. Never miss a deadline again.

teams.title: Teams and Organizations
teams.description: Collaborate on shared projects, assign tasks, and monitor progress across your team.

personal.title: Personal Use
personal.description: Organize your daily life with shopping lists, reminders, goals, and personal projects.

credits.title: Built with Leading Technology
credits.subtitle: Powered by modern and reliable technologies

footer.tagline: Organize your work, ship with confidence
